cadence_note: DG ECFIN publishes the Joint Harmonised Business and Consumer Surveys monthly, with the full monthly release around the third-to-last working day of each month and a flash consumer-confidence estimate ~a week earlier (per ec.europa.eu/economy_finance business-and-consumer-surveys calendar). The connector fetches every flow in one run, so cadence tracks the fastest (monthly) flows; quarterly flows update in the relevant end-of-quarter release and the semi-annual investment surveys refresh in the March/April and October/November releases. A 20-day cadence polls roughly twice a month so each monthly release is picked up within days.
